Bash(node -e "require\('tsx/cjs'\); const {PROFILE_BANDS, DEFAULT_PROFILE, usedProviderNames}=require\('./src/recordings/profiles/PipelineProfile.ts'\); console.log\('bands:', PROFILE_BANDS.map\(b=>b.id+':'+b.providerName\).join\(' '\)\); console.log\('default:', DEFAULT_PROFILE.providerName\); console.log\('USED \(pre-warmed\):', usedProviderNames\(\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('overall',d['overallF1']\); [print\(s['scenario'].ljust\(20\), 'F1=%.2f'%s['f1'], 'P=%.2f'%s['precision'], 'R=%.2f'%s['recall'], 'oct=%.2f'%s['octaveErrorRate']\) for s in d['perScenario']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('label',d.get\('label'\),'mode',d.get\('mode'\),'overallF1',round\(d.get\('overallF1',0\),3\)\); [print\(s['scenario'].ljust\(20\), 'F1=%.2f'%s['f1'], 'P=%.2f'%s['precision'], 'R=%.2f'%s['recall'], 'oct=%.2f'%s['octaveErrorRate']\) for s in d['perScenario']]")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./scripts/fixtures/eval/report-adaptive-final.json'\); const rows=r.clips.filter\(c=>/voice|whistle/.test\(c.scenario\)&&c.melody==='arpeggio'\); for\(const c of rows\) console.log\(\(c.scenario+'/'+c.condition\).padEnd\(28\), 'F1='+c.f1.toFixed\(2\), 'recall='+c.recall.toFixed\(2\), 'est='+c.estCount, 'ref='+c.refCount\);")
Bash(EVAL_ADAPTIVE=1 EVAL_SCENARIOS=__TRACKED_VAR__ EVAL_LABEL=onset-on EVAL_OUT=/tmp/onset-on.json npx tsx scripts/eval/run-eval.ts)
Bash(EVAL_ADAPTIVE=1 EVAL_NO_ONSET_SPLIT=1 EVAL_LABEL=v5-mergeguard EVAL_OUT=scripts/fixtures/eval/report-v5.json npx tsx scripts/eval/run-eval.ts)
Bash(EVAL_ADAPTIVE=1 EVAL_SCENARIOS=__TRACKED_VAR__ EVAL_OUT=/tmp/con-on.json npx tsx scripts/eval/run-eval.ts)

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./scripts/fixtures/eval/report-v7-final.json'\); const rows=r.clips.filter\(c=>/voice-bass|whistle-mid/.test\(c.scenario\)\); for\(const c of rows\) console.log\(\(c.scenario+'/'+c.melody+'/'+c.condition\).padEnd\(40\),'F1='+c.f1.toFixed\(2\),'rec='+c.recall.toFixed\(2\),'est='+c.estCount,'ref='+c.refCount\);")
